##NAMES=Marsturite
##RRUFFID=R141122
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=NaCaMn^2+^_3_Si_5_O_14_(OH)
##LOCALITY=Joaquina 1<sup>a</sup> mine, Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Joan Abella i Creus
##DESCRIPTION=Massive aggregate of elongated or bladed grey to grey-brownish crystals
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
